hero.name: Enrico Perania
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack · Backend · AI Systems · 9+ years · Lima, Peru

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Product-focused Software Engineer · Full-Stack & Backend
about.bio1: Product-focused Software Engineer with ~9 years of experience building scalable web applications and distributed systems across LATAM, the US, and Europe. Strong background in full-stack and backend development, cloud-native architectures, and DevOps automation.
about.bio2: Throughout my career I've worked with high-performance remote teams at Holded, Factorial, Retool, and Kueski — delivering high-impact features in startup and scale-up environments. Proven ability to lead technical migrations, architect distributed systems, and integrate AI into production workflows.
about.bio3: Currently leading Backend & AI Systems at Kueski, Mexico's leading fintech. Open to full-time remote or freelance consulting opportunities with tech companies in Spain, LATAM, and the US.

fullStack.title: Full Stack Development
fullStack.description: End-to-end modern web applications with React, Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. Clean architecture, robust tests, and optimized performance.

cloudArchitect.title: Cloud Architecture
cloudArchitect.description: Design and implementation of scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS, GCP, and Azure. Kubernetes, serverless, and cost optimization.

devops.title: DevOps & CI/CD
devops.description: Continuous integration and deployment pipelines that automate from code to production. Infrastructure as code with Terraform and Helm.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.description: Integration of language models, RAG pipelines, and vector databases into software products. From proof-of-concept to production.

distributed.title: Distributed Systems
distributed.description: Microservices architectures, event-driven systems, and async communication with Pub/Sub. High availability and fault tolerance.

leadership.title: Technical Leadership
leadership.description: Engineering team mentoring, reference architecture definition, and facilitation of technical growth in product organizations.
